official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound select_advancements_tab fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official nullable Identifier body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns select_advancements_tab to packet id 0x55.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the select_advancements_tab id to ClientboundSelectAdvancementsTabPacket.
The official select_advancements_tab body is a nullable Identifier.
The fixture uses a non-null Identifier only and does not require an advancement tree or initialized screen state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded Identifier, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove advancement UI behavior, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer advancement UI behavior, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
